title: After the Yasuda Kinen: A Consolatory Bath

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus is in top form and defeats
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser stays optimistic despite her
frustration. Ikuno Dictus kindly tells her, "I didn't
let my guard down because you were here."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, she invites Matikanetannhauser to a
bathhouse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Time to fully recover and focus on the next race!
